title: Expressing support for the designation of July 2025 as Veterans Appreciation Month.
plain_summary: This bill is a resolution that asks the House of Representatives to support making July 2025 a special month called Veterans Appreciation Month. The resolution wants to officially recognize and honor veterans during this time. It explains that veterans deserve this recognition because they made sacrifices and served our country to protect American freedom and democracy. The goal is to have a whole month dedicated to showing appreciation for the men and women who served in the military.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on Oversight and Government Reform.

sections.title: Resolution Title
sections.text: This resolution expresses support for making July 2025 a special month to appreciate veterans.

sections.title: Reasons for Veterans Appreciation Month
sections.text: United States veterans answered our country's call to serve. Veterans fought our nation's battles in the air, on land, and at sea. The brave men and women who served in the United States Armed Forces made great sacrifices to protect the freedom and democracy of the United States. United States veterans willingly put the well-being of our nation above their own needs. Because of their huge sacrifice and bravery, veterans deserve to be honored during the entire month of November and throughout the year. July is a time when America celebrates its independence and freedom. This makes it a good time to recognize the serious problems that veterans face and the urgent need to make sure that all people who served in the United States Armed Forces get proper care and protection. The people of the United States are proud of the brave service of all who served in the United States Armed Forces.

sections.title: Resolution Statement
sections.text: The House of Representatives supports making July 2025 Veterans Appreciation Month.
